headline: FMX Boosts Share Repurchase Plan, Progresses Well on Forward Strategy
summary: Fomento ramps up buybacks with a $300M ASR after completing a $260M repurchase, advancing its shareholder return strategy.

headline: Jim Cramer on Conagra Brands: “I Don’t Want to Go There”
summary: Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE:CAG) is one of the stocks highlighted in Jim Cramer’s latest Mad Money recap as he provided top stock insights. Toward the end of the lightning round, responding to a caller’s question about the stock, Cramer said: Conagra’s tough. I never buy a stock just for its yield. Conagra’s got a big […]

headline: Is Conagra Brands (CAG) Now A Bargain After A 35% Share Price Slide?
summary: Wondering whether Conagra Brands at US$15.46 is starting to look like value, or if the recent share price weakness is a warning sign. The stock has seen a 3.6% decline over the last week, a 16.3% decline over the past month, and is down 35.4% over the last year. This may change how the market views its risk and return profile. Recent attention has focused on Conagra Brands as a major packaged food player at a time when investors are reassessing consumer staples more broadly. That context...
